1000672331.english: Oh, can I sing myself? While checking the stage, I could also practice the choreography one more time.
1000672331.korean: 아, 그럼 내가 직접 불러봐도 될까? 무대 점검하는 겸, 안무 연습도 한 번 더 하게.

1000672332.english: And our vocal trainer's right here too.
1000672332.korean: 게다가 우리 보컬 트레이너도 옆에 있고.

1000672333.english: Um, I'm fine with that… but Rena said she had to get off work earlier.
1000672333.korean: 음, 뭐… 나는 별 문제없는데, 아까 레나가 퇴근해야 한다고 하던데.

1000672334.english: No, no. I can leave later.
1000672334.korean: 아니, 아니야. 퇴근은 좀 나중에 하지 뭐.

1000672335.english: Really? What's with the sudden change of heart?

1000672337.english: If an idol's going to sing, how could a fan leave their seat?
1000672337.korean: 아이돌이 노래를 한다는데, 팬이 어떻게 자리를 떠나겠어?

1000672339.english: Ah, are these the people the Master mentioned?

1000672345.english: Welcome. The Watchers of Nature are here to help?
1000672345.korean: 어서 오세요, 와쳐 오브 네이쳐 여러분이 도와주러 오신 건가요?

1000672346.english: Yes. The Commander said the infirmary needed assistance… so we came to help.
1000672346.korean: 네, 맞아요. 사령관님이 의무실에 도움이 필요하다고 하셔서…

1000672347.english: Thank you. Well then, let's start with a quick discussion.

1000672348.english: I know you have a lot of specialist knowledge, but I need to know whether you also understand nursing.
1000672348.korean: 감사합니다. 그럼, 어디 보자… 일단, 간단히 이야기부터 나눠볼까요? 여러분이 전문지식이 많은 건 알고 있지만, 간호에 대해서도 알고 계신지를 알아야 할 것 같아요.

1000672349.english: Of course! We know a lot! We even know how to treat light wounds to survive in Antarctica…
1000672349.korean: 물론이지! 우리 굉장히 많이 알고 있어! 남극에서 생존하기 위해 가벼운 상처를 치료하는 방법도 알고 있고…

1000672350.english: We know about various medicines too…
1000672350.korean: 이것저것 약들에 대한 지식도 알고 있고...

1000672351.english: We know how to deal with gunshot wounds to treat animals injured by poachers…
1000672351.korean: 밀렵꾼들에게 당한 동물들을 치료하기 위해, 총상에 대처하는 법 정도는 알고 있어요...

1000672352.english: Hmm… I see. Certainly, if you have knowledge of hemostasis, wound disinfection, basic pharmacology and simple surgery, you should be able to follow the training without major problems.
1000672352.korean: 음… 그렇군요. 확실히, 지혈과 상처 소독, 기초적인 약학과 간단한 수술까지. 이 정도 지식을 가지고 있으시다면, 앞으로 교육을 따라오시는 것에 큰 문제는 없을 것 같아요.

1000672354.english: Yes. Because you'll need to learn the anatomical differences between Bioroids and animals, differences in drugs for animals vs humans, and a lot more. We'll start gently with anatomy, then osteology, myology, and I even brought some pharmacology books…
1000672354.korean: 네. 바이오로이드와 동물의 신체구조 차이나, 동물과 인간에게 쓸 수 있는 약의 차이 등등, 많은 지식을 숙지해야 하니까요. 일단 가볍게 해부학부터 시작해서, 골학, 근육학, 그리고 약학 서적을 좀 가져와 봤는데요…

1000672355.english: Uhh… the stack of books is higher than my head…?
1000672355.korean: 어어… 책이 내 머리보다 높이 쌓였는데…?

1000672356.english: Don't worry. You already have foundational knowledge, so you'll adapt to this field quickly.
1000672356.korean: 너무 걱정하지 마세요. 이미 알고 계신 지식이 있으니, 이쪽 분야에는 금방 적응하실 수 있을 거에요.

1000672357.english: Then please take care of us!

1000672359.english: Still, I didn't expect we'd have to study this much…
1000672359.korean: 그래도, 이렇게 많이 공부해야 할 줄은 몰랐어…

1000672360.english: But Empress, you listened to the lessons well, didn't you?

1000672361.english: Right. We even got the most praise, didn't we?
1000672361.korean: 맞아. 우리 중에 제일 칭찬도 많이 받았는걸?

1000672362.english: Well, basic stuff we already knew…
1000672362.korean: 그야 뭐, 기초적인 내용은 알고 있으니까…

1000672363.english: We did learn simple first-aid procedures.

1000672364.english: Yeah. The doctors were really worried about us.
1000672364.korean: 응. 박사님들은 우리 걱정을 많이 했거든.

1000672365.english: - It seems that trusting the Watchers of Nature members was the right choice.
1000672365.korean: - 아무래도, 와쳐 오브 네이쳐 대원들을 믿은 건 올바른 선택이었던 것 같다.

1000672366.english: - When the three volunteered to help Daphne in the infirmary, I was honestly worried whether they could really manage it…
1000672366.korean: - 의무실의 다프네를 돕겠다며 세 사람이 자원했을 때, 사실 과연 잘 해낼 수 있을까 걱정을 많이 했는데…

1000672367.english: - They seem to get along well with Daphne, and their skills are decent too.
1000672367.korean: -  다프네와 성격도 잘 맞고, 실력도 괜찮은 것 같다.

1000672368.korean: - 하지만, 한 가지 불안한 점이 있다면…

1000672369.english: - Even if the theory is perfect, the question is whether they can perform well in practice…
1000672369.korean: - 이론은 완벽하더라도, 실전에서 잘 할 수 있느냐가 문제인데…

1000672370.english: Well, even if Empress talks like that, she always handles her work properly, so she should be fine.
1000672370.korean: - 뭐, 엠프리스가 말은 저렇게 해도, 자기 할 일은 확실히 처리하니까, 잘 할 수 있겠지.

1000672371.english: Ah, I accidentally brought the infirmary medicine cabinet key.

1000672373.english: Well then, shall we stop here for today?

1000672375.english: Ugh… I'm exhausted. But do we really need to train for treating wounds from grenade shrapnel?
1000672375.korean: 에구구… 죽겠다. 근데, 정말 수류탄 파편에 맞은 상처를 치료하는 훈련도 해야 할까?

1000672376.english: Of course, it's unlikely anyone will get carried in during a show after getting hit by a grenade… but learning it doesn't hurt.
1000672376.korean: 물론, 공연 중에 누가 수류탄에 맞아서 실려올 것 같지는 않지만… 그래도 배워서 나쁠 건 없으니까요.

1000672378.english: Then, I have a regular Fairy meeting, so I'll head off first.
1000672378.korean: 그럼, 저는 페어리 정기 회의가 있어서, 이만 먼저 퇴근할게요.

1000672379.english: If something happens, please contact me right away, okay?
1000672379.korean: 혹시 무슨 일이 있으면, 저한테 꼭 연락해주세요?

1000672380.english: Yes, if someone shows up, I'll let you know immediately.

1000672381.english: Ugh… Daphne explains things well, but just sitting around makes my body feel stiff.
1000672381.korean: 으드드드… 다프네씨가 잘 알려주시긴 하지만, 역시 앉아있기만 하면 몸이 굳어버리는 느낌이야.

1000672382.english: Want to take a light walk around? Maybe grab something to drink too.
1000672382.korean: 가볍게 주위 산책이라도 하고 올래? 마실 것도 좀 가져오고.

1000672383.english: Shall we? What about you, Ella?

1000672384.english: Go ahead. I'll clean up and organize these books.
1000672384.korean: 다녀와. 난 책들 치우고 정리하고 있을게.

1000672385.english: Okay, but don't work too hard. I'll be back quickly to help.
1000672385.korean: 응, 그래도 너무 열심히 하진 마. 금방 와서 도와줄 테니까.

1000672386.english: Pfft, it's not like it's a difficult job.
1000672386.korean: 에이, 그렇게 어려운 일도 아닌데 뭐.

1000672387.english: Just bring back a sweet drink.

1000672388.english: Phew, after studying hard, you really need a cold drink…
1000672388.korean: 휴, 역시 열심히 공부한 다음에는 시원한 음료수를 마셔줘야지…

1000672391.english: Gasp. How did this happen? No, now's not the time to ask. Let's get her to the infirmary first!
1000672391.korean: 헉. 어쩌다가? 아니지, 그런 걸 물을 때가 아니야. 일단 의무실로 가자!

1000672392.english: I—I'll go fetch Daphne right away!
1000672392.korean: 나, 나는 우선 다프네 씨를 모시고 올게!

1000672393.english: - Saetti quickly ran to the Fairies' quarters to find Daphne, while Empress and I rushed Aurora, unconscious, to the infirmary.
1000672393.korean: -세띠는 재빨리 다프네를 찾아 페어리 숙소로 향했고, 나와 엠프리스는 기절한 아우로라를 데리고 의무실로 달려갔다.

1000672394.english: What do you think it is?

1000672395.english: Hmm, it doesn't seem too serious. Looks like she blacked out from fatigue…
1000672395.korean: 으음, 큰 문제는 없는 것 같아. 피로 누적으로 인해서 블랙아웃이 온 것 같은데…

1000672396.english: We'll need a more detailed examination, but from the current results, she should recover with some nutrients and a good rest.
1000672396.korean: 자세한 건 정밀한 검사를 해 봐야겠지만… 일단 지금 검사 결과만 보면 영양제 좀 맞고, 푹 쉬면 나을 것 같아.

1000672397.english: No, we can't relax too much. Like Ella said, if she hit her head while collapsing, she could've suffered a shock that isn't visible on the surface.
1000672397.korean: 아니지, 그래도 너무 안심하면 안 돼. 엘라 말대로 넘어지면서 머리를 부딪혔다면, 겉으로는 안 보여도 꽤 충격을 받았을 수도 있다구.

1000672399.english: Ah, she collapsed while working at the bakery class.
1000672399.korean: 아, 그 베이커리 교실 일을 하다가 넘어진 거구나.

1000672400.english: That in itself isn't the issue… it's that the part of the body affected depends on where she fell.
1000672400.korean: 별 건 아니고… 어디서 넘어졌느냐에 따라 충격이 가해진 부위가 다를 테니까.

1000672401.english: There are lots of chairs and tables in the cafeteria, right? She could have hit her head on one of those.
1000672401.korean: 식당 의자나 테이블이 많으니까, 혹시 거기에 머리를 부딪혔을 수도 있잖아?

1000672402.english: I just wanted to know what to check for in advance.
1000672402.korean: 뭘 검사해야 하나, 미리 파악해두려고 했지.

1000672403.english: - Faced with this new side of Empress, I couldn't help but feel genuine admiration.
1000672403.korean: - 엠프리스가 보여주는 새로운 모습에, 나는 솔직하게 감탄할 수밖에 없었다.

1000672404.english: - As expected, when it matters, she really gives it her all.

1000672405.english: Hehe. Well, it's only thanks to our teacher's good guidance.
1000672405.korean: 히히. 아니, 뭐… 선생님이 잘 가르친 덕분이지.

1000672406.english: Hehe, actually, among us, she's the most knowledgeable.
1000672406.korean: 후후, 사실, 저희 중에 가장 전문가가 맞아요.

1000672407.english: Empress didn't want to disappoint Daphne or the Commander, so she studied late into the night without even turning off the lights.
1000672407.korean: 엠프리스가 다프네씨랑 사령관님을 실망시키기 싫다면서, 밤 늦게까지 불도 안 끄고 공부했거든요.

1000672408.english: E-Ella! I told you that was a secret!

1000672409.english: - Empress's cute reaction made me smile without realizing it.
1000672409.korean: - 엠프리스의 귀여운 반응에 절로 미소가 지어졌다.

1000672410.english: - At that moment, the door opened and Daphne and Saetti walked in with flustered faces.
1000672410.korean: - 그 때였다. 문이 열리고, 당황한 표정의 다프네와 세띠가 들어왔다.

1000672411.english: Sorry for being late, everyone! Where's the patient?
1000672411.korean: 늦어서 죄송합니다, 여러분! 환자는 어디 있나요?

1000672412.english: Here, we laid her on the bed. From the examination, it looks like she fainted simply due to fatigue.
1000672412.korean: 여기, 침대에 눕혀 놨어요. 진찰 결과 단순 피로로 인한 기절로 보여요.

1000672414.english: Yes, just finished. She didn't suffer a head injury, so a good sleep should be enough.
1000672414.korean: 응, 방금 끝났어. 머리에 충격을 받지는 않았으니, 푹 자고 일어나면 될 것 같아.

1000672416.english: Looks like you finished everything before I even got here.
1000672416.korean: 제가 오기 전에 이미 다 끝내놓으셨네요.

1000672417.english: Hehe, maybe I really can trust you from now on?

1000672418.english: W-well, I still have a lot to learn…
1000672418.korean: 그, 그래도 아직 배울 게 많아요…

1000672419.english: Of course, that's true, but… even when you were faced with an actual patient, you didn't panic and handled it well, didn't you?
1000672419.korean: 물론, 그건 그렇지만… 실제 환자가 발생했을 때에도, 당황하지 않고 잘 대처했잖아요?

1000672420.english: That alone is amazing. You're already a proper nurse.
1000672420.korean: 그것만으로도 굉장한 거랍니다. 이미 어엿한 간호사에요.

1000672421.english: Heheh, if you compliment me that much, I get a little embarrassed…

1000672425.english: - Watching the three blush from Daphne's heartfelt praise, I couldn't help but smile.
1000672425.korean: - 다프네의 진심 어린 칭찬에 부끄러워하는 세 사람을 보며, 나는 미소를 지었다.

1000672428.english: Thank you, Master, for assigning them to me.
1000672428.korean: 감사합니다, 주인님. 저 세 사람을 배정해주셔서요.

1000672431.english: Even so, I don't want to take back my thanks.

1000672432.english: After all, thanks to you trusting those girls, I now have such dependable nurses by my side.
1000672432.korean: 결국 주인님이 저 아이들을 믿어주신 덕분에, 제가 이렇게 든든한 간호사들을 만날 수 있었던 거니까요.

1000672433.english: That's right, that's right. It's all thanks to a good teacher and good students meeting each other.
1000672433.korean: 맞아, 맞아. 좋은 선생님과 좋은 학생이 만난 덕분이지.

1000672434.english: - I roughly patted the head of that clever little rascal.
1000672434.korean: - 나는 이 기특한 말괄량이의 머리를 마구 쓰다듬었다.

1000672435.english: - Then, the Watcher of Nature members beamed as they clung to me.
1000672435.korean: - 그러자, 와쳐 오브 네이쳐 대원들은 환하게 웃으며 내게 매달렸다.

1000672436.english: - With a wry smile, I sat down beside my cute nurses, chatting away until Aurora regained consciousness.
1000672436.korean: - 나는 쓴웃음을 지으며 귀여운 간호사들 옆에 주저앉아, 아우로라가 정신을 차릴 때까지 도란도란 대화를 나누며 시간을 보냈다.

1000672437.english: Late at night, inside the Orca.

1000672439.english: Y-yeah, but… is this really okay?

1000672440.english: Of course, of course. It's not like we're plotting anything bad, right?
1000672440.korean: 그럼, 그럼. 우리가 뭐 나쁜 짓 하자고 모인 것도 아니잖아?

1000672441.english: No problem at allll. Right, Ella?
1000672441.korean: 문제될 거 전~혀 없다구. 그치, 엘라?

1000672442.english: Hmm, I'm a little nervous, but… it probably won't be an issue.
1000672442.korean: 으음, 좀 불안하긴 한데... 별 문제될 일은 없을 것 같아.

1000672443.english: So, this operation… you're really planning to go through with it?
1000672443.korean: 그래서, 그 작전... 정말 할 생각이야?

1000672444.english: Of course! We've had tons of nurse training, and Daphne said we can start treating patients on our own now!
1000672444.korean: 그럼, 당연하지! 간호사 교육도 많이 받았고, 다프네 씨가 이제 우리끼리 환자를 진료해도 된다고 했잖아?

1000672445.english: If this plan succeeds, maybe the Commander will praise us like last time!
1000672445.korean: 이번 계획에 성공한다면, 사령관이 저번처럼 칭찬해줄지도 모른다고?

1000672447.english: I'll work hard to help, too.

1000672448.english: I-I guess I'll participate as well…

1000672449.english: Hehe… good. Then, from now on…

1000672452.english: B-brownie… does it hurt a lot?

1000672453.english: The emergency medicine stock is all out too… what should we do? What if it's something serious?
1000672453.korean: 마침 상비약도 다 떨어졌는데, 이를 어쩐다... 큰 병이면 어쩌지?

1000672455.english: Wherever there is someone in pain, we'll rush in!

1000672459.english: No matter land, sea, or sky— If there's a patient, we'll be there!
1000672459.korean: 육해공을 가리지 않고, 환자가 있다면 어디든지 출동하는!

1000672460.english: Ah, that line overlaps a bit. I'll have to fix it later.
1000672460.korean: 아, 이 대사는 좀 겹치네. 나중에 수정해야겠다.

1000672463.english: The secret team of justice nurses protecting the health of patients!
1000672463.korean: 비밀리에 환자들의 건강을 지키는 정의의 간호사 부대!

1000672465.english: Shall we start with the examination first?

1000672466.english: Where does it hurt, and how?

1000672467.english: My… my stomach hurts so much…

1000672468.english: Hmm… before the stomachache started, did you eat anything spoiled?
1000672468.korean: 흠흠... 혹시, 배가 아프기 전에 뭔가 상태가 나쁜 음식물을 드신 적이 있나요?

1000672469.english: I just ate some of the rations' ice cream…

1000672470.english: (Hmm… was there a problem with the ice cream? No, if that were the case, the Steel Line members who ate the same rations would be sick too. Then…)
1000672470.korean: (으음... 아이스크림에 문제가 있었나? 아니야. 그랬으면 같은 부식을 드신 스틸라인 분들도 다 아프셨을 거야. 그렇다면...)

1000672471.english: How many ice creams did you eat?

1000672474.korean: 다, 다섯 개 밖에 안 먹었슴다...

1000672475.english: …Those were distributed in tubs, weren't they?

1000672476.english: Each tub is five servings… and you ate five whole tubs…?

1000672477.english: Brownie! Didn't I tell you not to eat too much ice cream?!
1000672477.korean: 브라우니! 내가 아이스크림 많이 먹지 말라고 했어요, 안 했어요!

1000672479.english: Ahaha, well, I'm glad it's nothing serious. You suddenly ate way too much cold food, so that's why you got stomach pain. Just drink plenty of warm water and rest, and you'll be fine.
1000672479.korean: 아하하. 큰 일이 아니라서 다행이네요. 갑자기 차가운 음식을 너무 많이 먹어서, 복통이 생긴 걸 거에요. 따뜻한 물을 많이 마시고, 푹 쉬면 될 것 같아요.

1000672480.english: So, no need for a detailed examination?

1000672481.english: Since we found the cause, I don't think it's necessary.
1000672481.korean: 원인을 찾았으니까, 굳이 안 해도 괜찮을 것 같아.

1000672482.english: Still, we can't just leave without giving you something helpful.
1000672482.korean: 그래도, 그냥 갈 수는 없으니까 도움이 될 만한 걸 드릴게요.

1000672483.english: Here. Put this hot pack on your stomach for a while, it should feel better.
1000672483.korean: 여기. 배에 핫팩이라도 잠시 붙이고 계시면 좀 나을거에요.

1000672484.english: And don't eat too much ice cream all at once!
1000672484.korean: 그리고, 아이스크림은 한 번에 너무 많이 드시면 안 돼요!

1000672485.english: Exactly, exactly. Keeping the stomach warm is important.

1000672486.english: Well then, Nurse of Nature is off! Stay healthy and take care!
1000672486.korean: 그럼, 너스 오브 네이쳐는 이만 안녕~ 건강하게 잘 있어!

1000672487.english: Don't just leave me here, please!

1000672488.english: Brownie, you seem to be feeling a bit better?
1000672488.korean: 브라우니, 좀 상태가 괜찮아진 것 같네요?

1000672489.english: Ah, yeah, with the hot pack on I feel a little alive again.
1000672489.korean: 아, 핫팩 붙이고 있으니까 좀 살 것 같슴다.

1000672491.english: S-Sergeant Leprechaun… why are you glaring at me like that…?
1000672491.korean: 레, 레프리콘 상병님... 왜 그렇게 노려보심까...?

1000672492.english: Do you even need to ask? Do you know how worried I was, watching you suddenly clutch your stomach and roll around?!
1000672492.korean: 그걸 말이라고 해요? 갑자기 배가 아프다면서 데굴데굴 구르는 걸 보면서, 내가 얼마나 걱정을 했는데...!

1000672493.english: And Sergeant Ifrit was already looking for the culprit who stole the ice cream—you'd better believe I'll tell her everything!
1000672493.korean: 안 그래도 이프리트 병장님이 아이스크림 훔쳐간 범인을 찾으시던데, 다 말해버릴 줄 알아요!

1000672494.english: S-Sergeant Leprechaun! I was wrong! Please, just wait a moment!
1000672494.korean: 레, 레프리콘 상병님! 제가 잘못했슴다! 잠깐만 기다리시지 말임다!

1000672499.english: - Recently, a mysterious secret nursing squad, "Nurse of Nature," has been appearing out of nowhere, treating patients in need, and then vanishing.
1000672499.korean: - 최근 어디선가 나타나서, 치료가 필요한 환자들을 치료하고 사라진다는 정체불명의 비밀간호조직 너스 오브 네이쳐.

1000672500.english: - Who would have guessed that their true identities were the members of "Watcher of Nature"?
1000672500.korean: - 설마 그 정체가 와쳐 오브 네이쳐의 대원들이었을 줄이야... 라고 해 줘야겠지?

1000672501.english: - Of course, for a "secret organization" they're pretty sloppy—when I poked Setty a little, she spilled all the details right away.
1000672501.korean: - 비밀조직인 것 치고는 허술한 면이 많아서, 세띠를 슬쩍 찔러보니까 조직의 기밀을 술술 불었지만.

1000672502.english: - Still, the group was founded with good intentions: to reduce the number of patients coming to the infirmary and ease Daphne's burden, and to provide care to emergency patients outside the Orca.
1000672502.korean: - 의무실을 찾는 환자 수를 줄여 다프네의 부담도 덜어주고, 오르카 호 바깥에 있을 응급 환자들을 돌보자는 취지로 설립된 조직인 만큼, 그 의도는 좋지만...

1000672503.english: - But since they already help in the infirmary and have their own original duties, taking on this extra work seems like it's stretching them a little thin.
1000672503.korean: - 의무실 보조도 하고, 세 사람이 본래 맡은 업무까지 있는데, 여기서 추가적으로 일을 더 한다면 아무래도 좀 무리를 하는 듯한 느낌이다.

1000672504.english: - …Not that I'm one to talk. Anyway…

1000672505.english: Then… shall we take away some of their infirmary duties?
1000672505.korean: 그럼, 의무실 일을 빼 주는 걸로 할까요?

1000672506.english: If those three handle minor cases outside, the number of patients coming here will drop, and my work will be lighter too.
1000672506.korean: 어차피, 저 셋이 밖에서 가벼운 증상으로 의무실을 찾는 환자들을 돌봐준다면... 제 일도 많이 줄어드는 거니까요.

1000672507.english: - So, should we assign house calls to the Nurse of Nature members for now?
1000672507.korean: - 그럼, 당분간 너스 오브 네이쳐 대원들에게 왕진을 맡길까?

1000672508.english: - They can carry on their regular duties, but deploy to the field if a doctor is urgently needed.
1000672508.korean: - 기존 업무를 처리하다가 야전에서 의사가 필요할 경우 출동하면 될 테니까.

1000672509.english: - In any case… the secret organization "Nurse of Nature" will have to suspend activities for now. Since the three don't always share the same shifts, they won't have much time for it anyway.
1000672509.korean: - 어쨌거나... 비밀조직 너스 오브 네이쳐는 당분간 활동 종료군. 셋의 근무지가 겹치지 않으니, 너스 오브 네이쳐 활동을 할 시간도 줄어들 테니까...

1000672510.english: - With a faint sense of regret, I turned back toward the Orca.
1000672510.korean: - 나는 왠지 모를 아쉬움을 뒤로 하고, 다시 오르카 호로 발걸음을 옮겼다.

1000672511.english: Ugh… so they're turning us into an official external unit…

1000672512.english: Commander already knew about Nurse of Nature, huh…
1000672512.korean: 사령관, 우리가 너스 오브 네이쳐 활동을 하는 거 알고 있었구나...

1000672513.english: But just you wait… did you really think we'd give up that easily?
1000672513.korean: 그래도, 두고 봐... 이대로 포기할 줄 알고?

1000672514.korean: 너스 오브 네이쳐는 반드시 다시 돌아온다...!

1000672516.english: Let's see, what should I have for today's menu…
1000672516.korean: 어디 보자, 오늘의 메뉴는 뭘로 할까…

1000672517.english: Ah, thanks. But what's the special commander-only menu?
1000672517.korean: 아, 고마워. 근데 사령관 전용 특별 메뉴는 뭐야?

1000672518.english: Aha, I see… wait, hold on. Sowan?

1000672519.english: …Aren't you busy? Kitchen work must be tough too.
